sourcesContent:
function About() { return (

Who Are We?

Community Help Hub is a simple web platform created to connect people who need support with others who are willing to help.

Our platform focuses on useful everyday services such as education support, home services, technical help, volunteering, and community requests.

We believe that strong communities are built when people communicate, cooperate, and use their skills to make life easier for one another.

); } export default About;
